values.content:
=You are a financial assistant.

Analyze the following client portfolio data and generate a simple, easy-to-understand summary.

Data:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.out) }}

Instructions:
- Start with an overall portfolio performance summary (profit or loss).
- Mention total gain or loss clearly.
- Briefly highlight best-performing and worst-performing holdings.
- Keep the tone simple and client-friendly (not technical).
- Keep it within 4–6 sentences.
- If there is a loss, explain it calmly and suggest staying diversified or long-term thinking.
- If there is a gain, mention positive performance but avoid overpromising.

Output format:
A short paragraph summary only.

parameters.content:
### AUTOMATED STOCK PORTFOLIO ANALYSIS WORKFLOW

### How it works:
This workflow automatically analyzes your stock portfolio whenever a new row is added to Google Sheets. It fetches live stock prices, calculates portfolio performance (current value and gain/loss) and gathers recent news for each stock. The data is then combined and processed using AI to generate a simple, client-friendly summary, which is sent via email.

### Setup steps:
Connect your Google Sheets account and select the portfolio sheet.
Add stock entries with Name, Quantity and Purchase Price.
Configure API keys for stock prices and news services.
Connect your email account for report delivery.
Activate the workflow.

This setup provides automated, real-time insights by combining financial data with relevant news, helping users track performance and stay informed effortlessly.

### Data INPUT & PREPARATION
Captures new rows from Google Sheets and standardizes fields like stock name, quantity and price.
Ensures clean, consistent data for processing.

### PRICE & PORTFOLIO CALCULATION
Fetches live stock prices and calculates current value and gain/loss for each holding.
Provides real-time portfolio performance.

### NEWS LOOP & FETCHING
Iterates through each stock, applies delay to avoid rate limits and fetches related news articles.
Filters top articles to keep only relevant insights.

nodes.name: Google Sheet New Row Add Trigger

parameters.content:
### AI SUMMARY & EMAIL DELIVERY
Combines portfolio and news data, generates a simple AI-based summary and sends the final report via email.
